title: Bitou embarks on skills development initiative for youth
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Bitou Municipality has launched an initiative to mitigate unemployment and inadequate skill levels among the youth.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Bitou Municipality has launched an initiative to mitigate unemployment and inadequate skill levels among the youth."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Last week, the municipality sent 45 of its employees to pursue an advanced diploma in public administration and an additional 10 employees to enrol for a higher certificate in economic development at the University of the Western Cape (UWC).","html":"Last week, the municipality sent 45 of its employees to pursue an advanced diploma in public administration and an additional 10 employees to enrol for a higher certificate in economic development at the University of the Western Cape (UWC)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Illustrating its dedication to gender equality, 21 of the officials participating in the skills development initiative are male and 24 female."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This step follows a Bitou Municipal Council decision on 30 June 2022, to approve the municipality's Education, Training, and Development Policy,\" the Bitou municipal communication team said.","html":"\"This step follows a Bitou Municipal Council decision on 30 June 2022, to approve the municipality's Education, Training, and Development Policy,\" the Bitou municipal communication team said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The policy aligns with key South African legislation and frameworks, including the South African Qualifications Authority (Saqa), the National Qualifications Framework (NQF), and the National Skills Development Strategy 3.","html":"The policy aligns with key South African legislation and frameworks, including the South African Qualifications Authority (Saqa), the National Qualifications Framework (NQF), and the National Skills Development Strategy 3."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"During the send-off to Cape Town, new Bitou Mayor Claude Terblanche, who is also participating in the programme, encouraged the staff to work hard and use the opportunity to elevate themselves."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He also praised Bitou Municipal Manager Mbulelo Memani for his focus on skills development.","html":"He also praised Bitou Municipal Manager Mbulelo Memani for his focus on skills development."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Even when I was still a merchandiser, some of my friends were already working with him and they had also benefited,\" Terblanche said.","html":"\"Even when I was still a merchandiser, some of my friends were already working with him and they had also benefited,\" Terblanche said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"The world is changing and it's important to have skills so that you can still stand tall in the face of a rapidly evolving global and technological landscape.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He noted that service delivery should not be hampered by them taking on the extra workload.","html":"He noted that service delivery should not be hampered by them taking on the extra workload."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Bitou embarks on skills development initiative for youth
